Assistant Professor

Faisal Shameem

Mechanical Engineering expert at Galgotias University. Specializing in CFD, Bio-Fluid Mechanics, and Thermo-Fluid simulations with over 12 years of academic excellence.

M. Tech (AMU) 12+ Years Experience
Explore Research Connect

Core Expertise

Scientific Computing

Simulation & CFD

Mastery in ANSYS Fluent, ICEMCFD, and SolidWorks for complex engineering and biological fluid simulations.

Research Portfolio →
Academia

Fluid Mechanics

Dedicated educator teaching Thermodynamics, Heat Transfer, and Aerodynamic design to the next generation of engineers.

Teaching Pedagogy →
Innovation

Bio-Fluid Flow

Pioneering research in branch artery flow simulation and medical apparatus design with multiple filed patents.
